description: Stores milestones as sub-goals linked to parent goals via relation property. Milestone completion drives automatic goal progress calculation.

Title.description: Milestone name describing the deliverable or checkpoint

Goal.description: Link to the parent goal. Goals DB must be created before Milestones DB.

Due Date.description: Target completion date for this milestone

Completed At.description: Actual completion date. Set automatically when Status changes to Done.

Order.description: Sequence number (1-based) for display ordering within the goal

Notes.description: Optional context or completion notes for this milestone

Created At.description: Timestamp when the milestone was created

notes: Lazy creation by database name on first milestone addition. Requires Goals DB to exist first for the relation property. Milestone completion (Status = Done) triggers parent goal progress recalculation. Skipped milestones are excluded from progress calculation. Order field determines display sequence in reports and dashboards.
